rationale: Elec. Code §253.097 governs corporate and labor organization campaign contributions. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A corporation or labor organization may make campaign contributions from its own property to a political committee that has filed an affidavit with the committee's campaign treasurer appointment in accordance with Section 252.003(a)(4) or 252.0031(a)(2).
_note: Rule text concerns campaign finance; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
